response.justification: Candidate has ~13+ years of professional software experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with recent senior/staff roles at Naver and Tencent using the exact target stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS). Recent work at Naver explicitly covers AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the AI agent development requirement. Solid full-stack breadth, testing/TDD background, and DevOps exposure (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD) align well with the role. Gaps are Nest.js and Kotlin not being explicitly mentioned, but the foundation is strong enough that these should be easy ramps.
strengths: Direct recent experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and AI agents/MCP
Strong TDD, testing, and software craftsmanship background (workshops, Selenium course, Fluent-Asserts)
Polyglot full-stack engineer with backend, frontend, DevOps, and architecture experience well over 6 years
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin/Java for backend services not clearly demonstrated (Java appears only briefly in older roles)
Some employment entries look inconsistent (e.g., 'Founder, MercadoLibre' overlapping other full-time roles) — worth clarifying

key_factors.factor: Recent AI agent / MCP experience at Naver
Missing explicit Nest.js and Kotlin experience
